turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Heads up, we do record these calls for training and quality.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you confirm the name and the email on the account for me?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, name and email are both the ones on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: There's a charge on my card I don't recognize at all.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, let me pull up the recent charges and take a look.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I do see two charges on the same date here, that shouldn't happen.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So how long is it going to take to fix?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Right, that's exactly what I'm talking about.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I've applied the refund and you'll see it in three to five days. Anything else?
